lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Greetings Bwana! I am Trufitus Shakaya of the Tai Bwo Wannai village.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Welcome to our humble village.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does Bwana mean?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: It means friend, and friends come in peace. I assume that you come in peace?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, of course I do.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Well, that is good news, as I may have a proposition for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A proposition eh? Sounds interesting!

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I hoped you would think so. My people are afraid to stay in the village.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: They have returned to the jungle and I need to commune with the gods

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: to see what fate befalls us. You can help me by collecting some herbs that I need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Me? How can I help?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I need to make a special brew! A potion that helps me to commune with the gods. For this potion, I need very special herbs, that are only found in the deep jungle.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I can only guide you so far as the herbs are not easy to find. With some luck, you will find each herb in turn and bring to me. I will give you details of where to find the next herb.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: In return for this great favour I will give you training in Herblore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It sounds like just the challenge for me. And it would make a nice break from killing things!

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: That is excellent Bwana! The first herb that you need to gather is called

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Snake Weed.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: It grows near the vines in an area to the south west where

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: the ground turns soft and the water kisses your feet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm, sounds difficult, I don't know if I am ready for the challenge.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Very well then Bwana, maybe you will return to me invigorated and ready to take up the challenge one day?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am very sorry, but I don't have any time for that.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Very well then, may your journeys bring you much joy.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Maybe you will pass this way again and you then take up my proposal?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: But for now, fare thee well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am sorry, but I am very busy.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Very well then, may your journeys bring you much joy.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Maybe you will pass this way again and you then take up my proposal?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: But for now, fare thee well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does a warrior like me know about peace?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: When you grow weary of violence and seek a more enlightened path, please pay me a visit

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: as I may have a proposition for you. Now I need to attend to the plight of my people. Please excuse me...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tai Bwo Wannai? What does that mean?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: It means 'small clearing in the jungle' but it is now the name of our village.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a nice village, where is everyone?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: My people are afraid to stay in the village. They have returned to the jungle. I need to commune with the gods to see what fate befalls us.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: You may be able to help with this.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Hello Bwana, do you have the Snake Weed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Please don't try to deceive me.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I really need that Snake Weed if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Sorry, Bwana, that herb is so dirty that I can't even tell whether it is fresh. Please clean it first.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Great, you have the Snake Weed! Many thanks. Ok, the next herb is called Ardrigal. It is related to the palm and grows to the east in its brother's shady profusion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: To the east you will find a small peninsula, it is just after the cliffs come down to meet the sands, here is where you should search for it.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: That's not fresh snake weed, did you pick it yourself? Go get me some fresh snake weed and remember to pick it yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, sorry, what's the clue again?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: It grows near vines in an area to the south west where the ground turns soft and the water kisses your feet.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I really need that Snake Weed if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Hello Bwana, have you been able to get the Ardrigal?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Please don't try to deceive me.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I really need that Ardrigal if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Sorry, Bwana, that herb is so dirty that I can't even tell whether it is fresh. Please clean it first.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Great, you have the Ardrigal! Many thanks.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: You are doing well Bwana. The next herb is called Sito Foil, and it grows best where the ground has been blackened by the living flame.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, sorry, what's the clue again ?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: You are looking for Ardrigal. It is related to the palm and grows in its brothers shady profusion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: To the east you will find a small peninsula, it is just after the cliffs come down to meet the sands, here is where you should search for it.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I really need that Ardrigal if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Greetings Bwana, have you been successful in getting the Sito Foil?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Please don't try to deceive me.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I really need that Sito Foil if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Sorry, Bwana, that herb is so dirty that I can't even tell whether it is fresh. Please clean it first.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Well done Bwana, just two more herbs to collect.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: The next herb is called Volencia Moss. It clings to rocks for its existence. It is difficult to see, so you must search for it well.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: It prefers rocks of high metal content and a frequently disturbed environment. There is some, I believe to the south east of this village.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, sorry, what's the clue again?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: You are looking for Sito Foil, and it grows best where the ground has been blackened by the living flame.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I really need that Sito Foil if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Greetings Bwana, have you been successful in getting the Volencia Moss?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Please don't try to deceive me! I really need that Volencia Moss if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Sorry, Bwana, that herb is so dirty that I can't even tell whether it is fresh. Please clean it first.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Ah Volencia Moss, beautiful. One final herb and the potion will be complete. This is the most difficult to find as it inhabits the darkness of the underground. It is called Rogue's Purse, and is only to be found in

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: caverns in the northern part of this island. A secret entrance to the caverns is set into the northern cliffs of this land. Take care Bwana as it may be dangerous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, sorry, what's the clue again?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: You are looking for Volencia Moss. It clings to rocks for its existence. It is difficult to see, so you must search for it well.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: It prefers rocks of high metal content and a frequently disturbed environment. There is some, I believe to the south east of this village.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I really need that Volencia Moss if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Greetings Bwana, have you been successful in getting the Rogue's Purse?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Please don't try to deceive me, I really need that Rogue's Purse if I am to make this potion.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Sorry Bwana, that herb is so dirty I can't even tell whether it is fresh. Please clean it first.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Most excellent Bwana! You have returned all the herbs to me and, I can finish the preparations for the potion, and at last divine with the gods.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: Many blessings on you! I must now prepare, please excuse me while I make the arrangements.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, sorry, what's the clue again?

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: You are looking for Rogues Purse.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: It inhabits the darkness of the underground, and grows in caverns to the north. A secret entrance to the caverns is set into the northern cliffs, be careful Bwana.

lines.speaker: Trufitus
lines.text: I really need that Rogues Purse if I am to make this potion.
